comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: 3 strokes. 1: apex (top-center) DOWN to bottom-left. 2: apex (top-center) DOWN to bottom-right. 3: crossbar left→right at mid-height.

strokes.comment: Left leg: apex top-center DOWN to bottom-left
Right leg: apex top-center DOWN to bottom-right
Crossbar: left to right at mid-height
